subcodes.first_line: God willing, may the friends of God be illumined by the light of His Cause and be enkindled with the fire of the blessed Tree with such enkindlement that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله اولیای الهی بنور امر منور باشند و بنار سدره مبارکه مشتعل اشتعالیکه
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @unity; oneness of humanity, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @contention and conflict
